name: bolt-industrial-engineering-services
description: Bolt Industrial Engineering Services - One page engineering site

scripts.build: npm run sass && npm run copy
scripts.copy: cp src/index.html dist/ && cp -r content dist/ && cp src/js/app.js dist/js/app.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx concurrently "npm run sass:watch" "npx serve dist -l 3000"
scripts.start: npm run build && npx serve dist -l 3000
